title: Golden hearts: Texas girls’ volleyball team raised $9,000 for custodian who cheered them and waited for rides until 1 am
summary_full: A Texas girls' volleyball team surprised their custodian, Abel Rodriguez, with a car.  He often stayed late and waited for rides.  The students raised $9,000 in a week.  Local businesses helped with the vehicle and costs.  Rodriguez was overcome with emotion during the reveal.  This initiative provided him with reliable transportation.
